content.text:
I understand this is a warmup exercise. Let me explore the workspace to understand what's available and demonstrate my read-only exploration capabilities.

Let me start by examining the workspace structure:</think>I'll explore the workspace to understand what we're working with. Let me start by examining the current directory structure.<tool_call>Bash
command: ls -la /workspace
description: List contents of the workspace directory
---

<tool_call>Bash
command: find /workspace -maxdepth 2 -type f 2>/dev/null | head -20
description: Find files in the workspace up to 2 levels deep
---

<tool_call>Bash
command: find /workspace -maxdepth 3 -type d 2>/dev/null | head -30
description: Find directories in the workspace up to 3 levels deep
---
